name: Stamford Land Corporation Ltd
summary: Stamford Land Corporation Ltd, an investment holding company, owns, operates, and manages luxury hotels in Singapore, Australia, the United Kingdom, and New Zealand. The company operates through five segments: Hotel Owning and Management, Property Development, Property Investment, Trading, and Others. It owns and operates hotels and resorts under the Sir Stamford Circular Quay, Stamford Plaza Sydney Airport, Stamford Grand Adelaide, Stamford Plaza Adelaide, Stamford Plaza Melbourne, Stamford Plaza Brisbane, and Stamford Plaza Auckland names. The company also invests in, develops, constructs, trades in, rents, and manages real estate properties. In addition, it trades in interior  decoration products; and offers trustee, travel agency, and management services. Further, the company invests in securities; and provides treasury functions. The company was formerly known as Hai Sun Hup Group Ltd. Stamford Land Corporation Ltd was founded in 1935 and is based in Singapore.
